mapper.sql: id, regist_code, regist_name, regist_fee, regist_quota, sequence_no, delmark
mapper.select: SELECT FROM regist_level WHERE delmark = 0 ORDER BY sequence_no, id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO regist_level (regist_code, regist_name, regist_fee, regist_quota, sequence_no, delmark) VALUES (#{code}, #{name}, #{price}, #{quota}, #{sequenceNo}, 0)
mapper.delete: UPDATE regist_level SET delmark = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
